samples.note: Closing in 30 mins, about 20 croissants and a few pain au chocolats left from this morning's bake. Bakery closes at 6pm.
Lunch rush is over, we have 8 chicken teriyaki bentos left. Made fresh this morning, good until 9pm tonight.
Mixed organic greens, about 6 bags. Sell-by tomorrow but still crisp. Need to move these today.
Greek yogurt cups, about 24 of them. Expiring in 3 days, can't fit on main shelf anymore.
Pasta and canned tomatoes, close to 40 units total. Dented cans and damaged packaging, still sealed and safe.
Two large pepperoni pizzas, made 20 minutes ago, customer no-show. Still hot. Can hold for 45 minutes.
End-of-day surplus bag: 2 sandwiches, a salad, a yogurt, some fruit. Everything good until tomorrow morning.
One whole rotisserie chicken from today's batch, unsold. Cooked at 2pm, still warm, good for tonight.
